title: Chapter 53
content:
Chapter 53

I remained silent at her remark. She wasn't expecting a reply anyway. She took a scoop of some of my semen that hadn't dried and brought the finger to her mouth to taste it. It was a dick stirring scene but alas, I was all out. Still, it wasn't any less enjoyable.

"Hmm..." She mused on the taste for a bit before she said, "It tastes strange. Not like I thought it would, considering it came from a filthy place."

So the taste of the semen changed once the mana was absorbed as well. Before this, whenever I came inside the girl's mouth, they loved the taste of it, and they said that it replenished their mana.

However, she said it tasted strange. It was the most common remark from the women from my world. Considering that, perhaps it all had something to do with my mana.

Would my semen remain the same if I were to permanently build some vessels?

"Keep this between us. We shall talk about this tomorrow." Zara said, pulling me out of my thought process. I pushed the topic to the back of my mind and focused on Zara and replied, "Understood, Lady Zara. However, may I ask a question if you won't take any offense?"

"What is it?" She asked.

"Was it enjoyable for you, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"..." Zara remained silent for a while before she said, "It was ecstatic. I have never felt anything like it before."

Hearing her honest response despite her pride as a noble, I was internally happy and nodded, "I am glad I could be of service to you, Lady Zara. May I ask to do the same tomorrow?"

My question was mostly me stepping out of my bounds, but Zara didn't know what sex really was. To her, it was just an activity that pleasure could be derived from and also helped her with mana.

"Mhm. I grant you the permission to engage in this pleasant activity quite often as you can." Zara replied, giving me open permission to her pussy. I smiled and left the room after bidding her farewell. There was still some time before my shift ended, but Zara dismissed me for the day.

I returned home to find Rayla busy with housework as usual, while some were busy enjoying the new house, and some were busy training. Well, only Lucas was busy training. He sure was a hard worker. Other than him, everyone else was enjoying the luxury of getting out of the commoner district. Especially Martha.

Lucas should be a motivation for them, but I couldn't say anything. It wasn't like they needed to work hard like that.

I could help them raise their power by just sleeping with them.

Pah!

I approached Rayla, who was doing the housework without a skirt. I had managed to convince her not to wear any clothes inside the house, but she only agreed to take the lower half off, while her reason for not taking her top off was...

"My chest gets in the way of my work."

It wasn't like it was fully contained in her blouse, but it still helped to contain them a little. Monstrosities were a little too out of control, that much I had to admit.

"Aahh~"

Rayla had now fully come to enjoy spanking. It took a while, but I managed to get her hooked on it. Of course, anything too hard was still out of the question. It still hurt after all.

"Welcome home, my boy." Rayla greeted me with a kiss on my cheek, which was also something I taught her. Well, she already knew what kissing was thanks to our nightly adventures, but this affectionate way of greeting me was something I had asked her to reserve especially for me.

"What are you cooking?" I asked as I nonchalantly ran my hand down her ass crack, finding her moist baby making cave and penetrated it with two of my fingers.

"Uhhm~"

She moaned lightly at the intrusion and replied, "The beast meat you left preserved for us."

It was the bear meat that I had left for them in the room, which was cast with preservation magic. My mana was not enough for that, so I had to use an item from the shop. It was a fancy term for a fridge.

Anyway, I couldn't care less as the warm sensation on my fingers gripped me tightly, enticing me to keep my finger inside her all day and even sleep with them in her. However, I had to let go of her soon, as it wasn't good to play near fire.

It was somewhat of a disadvantage of free use. The women wouldn't just drop everything they were doing to have sex or engage in sexual activities. I would have to do it while she was engaged in her everyday activities.

I let go of her and went to my room to check the work on my mana containers. Time was of the essence. We needed to move to the big city soon, once I took over this city. Before that, I wanted to build my new body.

I was done for today anyway. Since I knew the timing would overlap, I would use one turn of the state of completion just after midnight when the time would refresh. I left the other one for after that, in case I needed to use it whenever the chance arose.

Just like today.

~~

After dinner, I went to take a bath, during which Rayla joined me. It had been a while since I had tasted her watermelon juices, so I welcomed her presence. But the dilemma arose when Sandra also joined us, and I had to choose between watermelon, which had a refreshing taste, and grapes, which were my favorite.

However, as if my luck was playing games with me, another presence only served to increase my dilemma. Martha joined me in the bath as well, making it a 'one big happy family'. I could only thank my lucky stars that none of the men joined us.

Lucas was focused on his training while Julian was busy calculating the finances for the house.

But the real problem was who to eat first. Watermelon, grapes, or strawberries. It was a dilemma I couldn't just ignore. Watermelons were refreshing, as I may have mentioned, grapes were not only my favorite but had a sweet and sour flavor to them, and finally, strawberries were perfect due to their juicy taste.

I couldn't decide, no matter how long I thought about it. So, I came up with a solution to remedy the situation.

Mix everything up.

~~

"Um, Jack. What are we doing?" Rayla asked with uncertainty as she wasn't sure what this position was supposed to signify. It wasn't just her, Sandra and Martha were confused as well, but Martha showed no intent of questioning my actions while Sandra just observed where it would lead to.

"It's something to feel good together." I simply replied and stepped back to admire the scene I had created.

The simple position called a stacked position. Designed to drill every party in a threesome or more, or in this case, a foursome. It was too bad it wasn't midnight yet, so I couldn't drill them. Besides, they weren't supposed to know that the other knew about my 'tail', so a threesome or foursome was out of the question for a while.

"But why this?" Rayla asked. I smirked and knelt down and licked her pussy. Since she was at the bottom, and the oldest, and the one who had the most questions, I decided to begin with her.

"Ang~"

Rayla moaned instead of getting an answer. I smirked as I flicked her pussy after parting it with my fingers.

"Um~"

She enjoyed the sensation from her slight moans from the looks of it. If she had any questions, she didn't have any more of them now.

[Cleanse x3]

I used cleanse on all of their assholes. Pulling my tongue back and making a pointy spear out of it, I ran it up the stack, tracing my tongue from Rayla's pussy to her asshole, from her asshole to Sandra's pussy and then her asshole, and then finally arriving at the shortest but the most favorable stack among the three, Martha's.

"Anh~"

"Ohhn~~"

"Hyaann~~"

All three of them moaned one after another as they felt the pleasurable sensations of my tongue exploring their forbidden caves.

To be honest, it was a bit too stimulating. To the point, I regretted having sex with Zara and not saving my turn for the day for this moment. All three of them already knew my secret, so even if they were to know the full story, it wouldn't really matter much.

However, there was no use regretting now. I decided to just enjoy myself to the infinite combination of the three flavors. And from the initial taste, I was sure my decision was correct.

"Thanks for the dinner."
